CUSTOMER AVATAR TEMPLATE
• This template will allow you better identify your market so that can tailor the
perfect message and also target the market more precisely
•Download and print your template
• Fill it in as best you can!
•Don’t stop at 1. Try to create at least 3 great customer Avatars
Download Your Customer Avatar Template

WHAT TRAFFIC CHANNEL IS RIGHT FOR YOUR
BUSINESS?
• Answer this question: Where is your avatar likely spending his/her time
online?
• Start with Facebook

-- 17 of 40 --

FACEBOOK?
• It Has Become So Intuitive
• Laser Like Targeting Capabilities
• Facebook now records a massive 1.55 billion monthly active users. So you’ll
likely find your market their AND once you’ve set up a profitable campaign,
Facebook has enough reach to allow for MASSIVE scale!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
